title: astragalus eriocarpus
intro: Astragalus eriocarpus, also known as Mormon tea or Indian tea, is a plant species in the legume family that is native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Astragalus eriocarpus include reducing stress and anxiety, improving immune function, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Astragalus eriocarpus can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
